steps.title: Recognize that rate equals the slope of the curve
steps.content: Since the graph shows cumulative rainfall over time, the rate of rainfall (cm/hour) is the slope of the curve. A horizontal line means slope = 0, so no rainfall is occurring.

steps.title: Calculate slope from x = 2 to x = 4
steps.content:
From the graph: at x = 2, the cumulative rainfall is 2 cm; at x = 4, it is still 2 cm. The line is horizontal over this interval.

$$\frac{2 - 2}{4 - 2} = \frac{0}{2} = 0 \text{ cm/hour}$$

The rate of rainfall was 0 centimeters per hour between x = 2 and x = 4. That matches choice D — D is correct.
